recommendations.title: Death Race 2000
recommendations.overview: In a boorish future, the government sponsors a popular, but bloody, cross-country race in which points are scored by mowing down pedestrians. Five teams, each comprised of a male and female, compete using cars equipped with deadly weapons. Frankenste

recommendations.title: Redline
recommendations.overview: A daredevil driver is determined to compete in Redline, the most popular race in the galaxy. The race only occurs every five years, but in order to participate he must overcome the mafia, the government and even love.

recommendations.title: The Darkest Hour
recommendations.overview: In Moscow, five young people lead the charge against an alien race which has attacked Earth via our power supply.

recommendations.title: The Wandering Earth II
recommendations.overview: Humans built huge engines on the surface of the earth to find a new home. But the road to the universe is perilous. In order to save earth, young people once again have to step forward to start a race against time for life and death.

recommendations.title: Hot Wheels AcceleRacers: Ignition
recommendations.overview: Two rival race teams, the Teku and the Metal Maniacs, are recruited by Dr. Peter Tezla to race in the fantastic Racing Realms and retrieve the all-powerful AcceleChargers before they fall into the hands of the deadly Racing Drones. Our drivers race t

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Insurrection
recommendations.overview: When an alien race and factions within Starfleet attempt to take over a planet that has "regenerative" properties, it falls upon Captain Picard and the crew of the Enterprise to defend the planet's people as well as the very ideals upon which the Fed

recommendations.title: Carnosaur
recommendations.overview: After being driven to extinction, great bloodthirsty dinosaurs come back to life with the assistance of a demented genetic scientist. She plans to replace the human race with a super-race of dinosaurs who will not pollute the planet.

recommendations.title: Death Race: Inferno
recommendations.overview: Carl Lucas / Frankenstein has won four of his races and needs to win one more to win his freedom. Before his final race, Lucas and his team, car and all, are transferred to another prison where they will compete in a Death Race in the desert. Also, a

recommendations.title: Battle for Terra
recommendations.overview: A peaceful alien planet faces annihilation, as the homeless remainder of the human race sets its eyes on Terra. Mala, a rebellious Terrian teenager, will do everything she can to stop it.

recommendations.title: Iron Will
